cant-delete-variant-with-documents: Product or variant %reference% cannot be deleted because it has already been purchased or sold. But you can block it if you want.
customer-subaccount-p: Indicate a subaccount to use or leave this field blank for one to be automatically assigned
desc-business-name: Official name of the customer, for invoices and other documents.
desc-customer-name: Name by which the customer is known. For internal use.
desc-parent-family: Indicates if the family is grouped in another higher level.
gap-found: Gap found for number %numero%, day %fecha%, %codserie% and company %idempresa%
gap-found-not-fillable: A gap was found for number %numero%, date %fecha%, series %codserie% and company %idempresa%; it will not be filled.
gaps-out-of-range: Found %count% gaps that cannot be filled because they are more than 1000 numbers away from the last one.
invalid-date-there-are-invoices-after: Invalid Date. There are already invoices dated after %date%
invalid-date-there-are-invoices-before: Invalid date. The date %date% is later than that of the following invoice.
invoice-receipts-diff: There is a (%diff%) difference between the invoice amount and the sum of its receipts.
parent-family-cant-be-child: The parent family cann't be the same as the child.
renumber-invoices-p: Renumber invoices based on date, from lowest to highest
renumber-invoices-success: Invoices from exercise '%exercise%' have been renumbered correctly
you-cant-delete-primary-variant: You cannot delete the main variant of the product
